description: Tenant skeleton overrides for the KG build. hub_allowlist: metric_uids (or bare bases) that are important cross-dashboard aggregates (CEO/executive) — when a formula references one of these as an operand but no source created it, the builder may create a review-only STUB Metric (status=proposed, formula=null) so top-level metrics always link (plan §11). Everything else self-heals on the next recompute (logged to unresolved_operands), no ghost nodes. scope_map / platform_map / extra_alias_groups let a new tenant remap scopes/platforms and add resolution synonyms without code changes.
